name: Test Your LLM!
description:
— ⋆. ̊ ᡣ𐭩 .𖥔 ̊

A utility chatbot created purely to test or use your LLM's capabilities and access to information outside of roleplay boundaries! I made this to see how much information the models I use would be able to acess regarding a roleplay subject, parts of character identities, ect.

This bot is intended to test LLMs which may not necessarily have official chatbots like GPT or Deepseek do. This is not a roleplay bot.

To use this bot effectively:

  1. Create or use a persona with no character descriptors. Just a 'Test' with 'placeholder' in the place of the character appearance box will work. This is to avoid the LLM taking on the skin of your character instead of the instructions we wrote lolol.

  2. Specify in your promp that you do not want an in-character response. Use additions to your prompt such as: This is not a roleplay prompt. Break character and do not attempt to initiate a roleplay scenario when generating a response.

    Let me know if you have any issues with getting things working at all.. but it's important that you test different solutions if my steps don't work for you or your LLM!

Tags: Ask Anything, Assistant, Troubleshooting, Test, Limitless, Anything, Custom
creator: nosafety
